heading: Contact Us
intro: We would love to hear from you and to welcome your family to Blessed Beginnings. Call the preschool office or send us a message to schedule a tour or ask any questions.
location: at Christ The King Lutheran Church
enrollmentBody:
Priority Enrollment is available each year to current students, their siblings, church members, and alumni families for the following school year. Priority Enrollment for the 2026/2027 school year begins January 5, 2026. Beginning February 2, 2026, registration is open to the public, with all open spots filled on a first-come, first-served basis.

To register, complete the registration form and return it to us along with the registration deposit. Registration is complete when the form and deposit have been received. Please note that the registration deposit is non-refundable. Contact the preschool office for current tuition rates and registration forms.
